description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 13/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Run formatter support checks for the final DSL.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Updated formatter locals for the final V3 DSL: action, controls, operation, result, schedules, lifecycle memory/compaction helpers, and removed old guardrail locals. Verified mix format --check-formatted, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E1: Run formatter support checks for the final DSL
